ast.name: alert
ast.source: Invalid JSON format for headers. Please correct and try again.
ast.target: 请求头的 JSON 格式无效。请更正后重试。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Added MCP server integration for external tool connections.
ast.target: 新增 MCP 服务器集成，用于外部工具连接。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: More documentation and information on these features is forthcoming.
ast.target: 关于这些功能的更多文档和信息将陆续提供。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Check settings for configuration and join our
ast.target: 请在设置中进行配置，并加入我们的

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: There's a ton of new stuff in this update, including:
ast.target: 本次更新包含大量新内容，包括：

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 👁️ 内置 LLM 视觉能力

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 🔧 新的 Action 节点功能

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: We rewrote a lot of core cannoli code to support this release,
ast.target: 为支持此版本，我们重写了大量 Cannoli 核心代码，

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: so if anything is broken, or you just wanna hang out with us,
ast.target: 因此如果有任何问题，或你只是想和我们交流，

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: let us know on the discord here:
ast.target: 请在此处的 Discord 告诉我们：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not parse message into JSON:
ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Cannot write after close. Assign an onready handler.
ast.target: 关闭后无法写入。请分配一个 onready 处理程序。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 无法刷新 OAuth 令牌：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Accessing resource attributes before async attributes settled
ast.target: 在异步属性就绪前访问资源属性

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error while trying to shutdown current span processor
ast.target: 尝试关闭当前 span 处理器时出错

ast.name: error
ast.source: A path leaving this group and re-enters it, this would cause deadlock.
ast.target: 有一条路径离开该组后又重新进入，这将导致死锁。

ast.name: error
ast.source: List edges can't cross into parallel groups. Try putting the node it's coming from inside the parallel group or using a non-list edge and an intermediary node.
ast.target: 列表边不能跨入并行组。请尝试将其来源节点放入并行组内，或使用非列表边并配合一个中间节点。

ast.name: error
ast.source: List edges can't cross between parallel groups.
ast.target: 列表边不能跨越并行组之间。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Parallel groups must have at least one incoming list arrow (cyan, labeled).
ast.target: 并行组必须至少有一条入站列表箭头（青色，带标签）。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Parallel groups can't have more than one incoming list arrow.
ast.target: 并行组不能有超过一条入站列表箭头。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Repeat groups loops must have a valid number in their label. Please ensure the label is a positive integer.
ast.target: 重复组循环的标签必须包含有效数字。请确保标签为正整数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Repeat groups can't have incoming edges of type list.
ast.target: 重复组不能有类型为列表的入边。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Repeat groups can't have any outgoing edges.
ast.target: 重复组不能有任何出边。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Nodes can't have any incoming list edges.
ast.target: 节点不能有任何入站列表边。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error calling LLM: no stream returned.
ast.target: 调用 LLM 出错：未返回流。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Error calling LLM: no message returned.
ast.target: 调用 LLM 出错：未返回消息。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Choice function call has no arguments.
ast.target: Choice 函数调用没有参数。

ast.name: error

ast.target: Choice 函数调用参数无效。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Choice nodes must have at least one outgoing choice edge.
ast.target: Choice 节点必须至少有一条出站 Choice 边。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Form function call has no arguments.
ast.target: Form 函数调用没有参数。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Named output nodes cannot be inside of parallel groups.
ast.target: 命名输出节点不能位于并行组内。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: (Optional) This base URL will be used to make all Anthropic LLM calls. If you are using the former ValTown proxy workaround, please clear this field.
ast.target: （可选）此基础 URL 将用于发起所有 Anthropic LLM 调用。如果你正在使用旧版 ValTown 代理变通方案，请清空此字段。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all Anthropic LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于发起所有 Anthropic LLM 调用。请注意，复杂的 cannoli 运行成本可能较高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This model will be used for all LLM nodes unless overridden with a config arrow.
ast.target: 此模型将用于所有 LLM 节点，除非通过配置箭头进行覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all Azure OpenAI LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于发起所有 Azure OpenAI LLM 调用。请注意，复杂的 cannoli 运行成本可能较高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This deployment will be used to make all Azure OpenAI LLM calls.
ast.target: 此部署将用于发起所有 Azure OpenAI LLM 调用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This instance will be used to make all Azure OpenAI LLM calls.
ast.target: 此实例将用于发起所有 Azure OpenAI LLM 调用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This version will be used to make all Azure OpenAI LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此版本将用于发起所有 Azure OpenAI LLM 调用。请注意，复杂的 cannoli 运行成本可能较高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This url will be used to make azure openai llm calls against a different endpoint. This is useful for switching to an azure enterprise endpoint, or, some other openai compatible service.
ast.target: 此 URL 将用于通过不同端点发起 Azure OpenAI LLM 调用。这对于切换到 Azure 企业端点或其他兼容 OpenAI 的服务很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all Groq LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于发起所有 Groq LLM 调用。请注意，复杂的 cannoli 运行成本可能较高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This url will be used to make all ollama LLM calls. Be aware that ollama models have different features and capabilities that may not be compatible with all features of cannoli.
ast.target: 此 URL 将用于发起所有 ollama LLM 调用。请注意，ollama 模型具有不同的功能和能力，可能与 cannoli 的所有功能不兼容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This model will be used for all LLM nodes unless overridden with a config arrow. (Note that special arrow types rely on function calling, which is not available in all models.)
ast.target: 此模型将用于所有 LLM 节点，除非通过配置箭头进行覆盖。（请注意，特殊箭头类型依赖函数调用，并非所有模型都支持。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to make all openai LLM calls. Be aware that complex cannolis, especially those with many GPT-4 calls, can be expensive to run.
ast.target: 此密钥将用于发起所有 openai LLM 调用。请注意，复杂的 cannoli，尤其是包含大量 GPT-4 调用的，运行成本可能较高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the cannoli you are about to run is estimated to make more than this amount of AI requests, you will be alerted before running it.
ast.target: 如果即将运行的 cannoli 预计会发起超过此数量的 AI 请求，你将在运行前收到提醒。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This url will be used to make openai llm calls against a different endpoint. This is useful for switching to an azure enterprise endpoint, or, some other openai compatible service.
ast.target: 此 URL 将用于将 openai LLM 调用指向不同的端点。这有助于切换到 Azure 企业端点，或其他兼容 openai 的服务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which provider settings to edit. This dropdown will also select your default provider, which can be overridden at the node level using config arrows.
ast.target: 选择要编辑的提供商设置。此下拉框还会选择你的默认提供商，可在节点级别使用配置箭头进行覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum number of LLM calls that can be made at once. Decrease this if you are running into rate limiting issues.
ast.target: 一次可进行的 LLM 调用的最大数量。如果遇到速率限制问题，请降低此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle this if you'd like colorless (grey) nodes to be interpreted as content nodes rather than call nodes. Purple nodes will then be interpreted as call nodes.
ast.target: 如果希望无色（灰色）节点被解释为内容节点而非调用节点，请切换此项。紫色节点将被解释为调用节点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggle this if you'd like to only run canvases that have one or more 'cannoli' labeled groups. Use this if you want to ensure you never run a canvas as a cannoli unless you've explicitly defined the parts of the canvas you want to be interpreted as a cannoli.
ast.target: 若仅希望运行包含一个或多个标记为“cannoli”的分组的画布，请切换此项。如果你希望确保除非明确定义要被解释为 cannoli 的画布部分，否则不会将画布作为 cannoli 运行，请使用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When extracting a note in a cannoli, include the filename as a top-level header. This default can be overridden by adding "#" or "!#" after the note link in a reference like this: {{[[Stuff]]#}} or {{[[Stuff]]!#}}.
ast.target: 在 cannoli 中提取笔记时，将文件名作为顶级标题包含。可在引用中的笔记链接后添加“#”或“!#”来覆盖此默认值，例如：{{[[Stuff]]#}} 或 {{[[Stuff]]!#}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When extracting or editing a note in a cannoli, include the note's properties (YAML frontmatter). This default can be overridden by adding "^" or "!^" after the note link in a reference like this: {{[[Stuff]]^}} or {{[[Stuff]]!^}}.
ast.target: 在 cannoli 中提取或编辑笔记时，包含笔记的属性（YAML 前置元数据）。可在引用中的笔记链接后添加“^”或“!^”来覆盖此默认值，例如：{{[[Stuff]]^}} 或 {{[[Stuff]]!^}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When extracting or editing a note in a cannoli, include the note's markdown link above the content. This default can be overridden by adding "@" or "!@" after the note link in a reference like this: {{[[Stuff]]@}} or {{[[Stuff]]!@}}.
ast.target: 在 cannoli 中提取或编辑笔记时，在内容上方包含笔记的 Markdown 链接。可在引用中的笔记链接后添加“@”或“!@”来覆盖此默认值，例如：{{[[Stuff]]@}} 或 {{[[Stuff]]!@}}。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This string will be used to format chat messages when using chat arrows. This string must contain the placeholders {{role}} and {{content}}, which will be replaced with the role and content of the message, respectively.
ast.target: 使用聊天箭头时，此字符串将用于格式化聊天消息。该字符串必须包含占位符 {{role}} 和 {{content}}，它们将分别替换为消息的角色和内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Move the cursor forward every time a token is streamed in from a chat arrow. This will lock the scroll position to the bottom of the note.
ast.target: 每当从聊天箭头流入一个 token 时，将光标向前移动。这将把滚动位置锁定在笔记底部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable cannolis to be triggered by audio recordings. When you make a recording in a note with a cannoli property: (1) The audio file will be transcribed using Whisper. (2) The file reference will be replaced with the transcript. (3) The cannoli defined in the property will run.
ast.target: 启用通过音频录音触发 cannoli。当你在包含 cannoli 属性的笔记中录音时：(1) 音频文件将使用 Whisper 转录；(2) 文件引用将被转录文本替换；(3) 属性中定义的 cannoli 将运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use this prompt to guide the style and vocabulary of the transcription. (i.e. the level of punctuation, format and spelling of uncommon words in the prompt will be mimicked in the transcription)
ast.target: 使用此提示来引导转录的风格和词汇。（即提示中的标点程度、格式以及不常见词语的拼写将在转录中被模仿。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After a recording is transcribed, delete the audio file.
ast.target: 录音转录完成后，删除音频文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: These secrets will be available in all of your cannolis, using "{{secret name}}". They are not stored in the canvas, and wil not be included when you bake a cannoli.
ast.target: 这些密钥将在你所有的 cannoli 中可用，使用“{{secret name}}”。它们不会存储在画布中，且在你烘焙 cannoli 时不会被包含。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The path to the folder where baked cannoli will be saved. There can be subfolders.
ast.target: 烘焙后的 cannoli 保存的文件夹路径。可以包含子文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This key will be used to create Vals on your Val Town account when you run the "Create Val" command.
ast.target: 当你运行“Create Val”命令时，此密钥将用于在你的 Val Town 账户上创建 Val。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: View information about your Cannoli Vals. This modal can also be opened using the "View vals" command.
ast.target: 查看有关你的 Cannoli Vals 的信息。也可使用“View vals”命令打开此模态框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable Phoenix tracing for your Cannoli runs. Phoenix is a data tracing platform that allows you to observe the history of your runs, and optimize your prompts over time.
ast.target: 为你的 Cannoli 运行启用 Phoenix 追踪。Phoenix 是一个数据追踪平台，可让你观察运行历史，并随着时间优化提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the project to use for your Phoenix traces. This is used to identify the project in the Phoenix UI.
ast.target: 用于 Phoenix 追踪的项目名称。这用于在 Phoenix UI 中识别该项目。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The base URL for your Phoenix traces. This is used to identify your Phoenix server.
ast.target: 用于 Phoenix 追踪的基础 URL。这用于识别你的 Phoenix 服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether connection to a Cannoli server is enabled.
ast.target: 是否启用与 Cannoli 服务器的连接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The secret of your Cannoli server.
ast.target: 你的 Cannoli 服务器密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL of your Cannoli server.
ast.target: 你的 Cannoli 服务器 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Check the status of your Cannoli server.
ast.target: 检查你的 Cannoli 服务器状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a folder of sample cannolis to your vault to walk you through the basics of Cannoli. (Delete and re-add this folder to get the latest version after an update.)
ast.target: 将示例 cannoli 文件夹添加到你的库中，带你了解 Cannoli 的基础知识。（更新后删除并重新添加此文件夹以获取最新版本。）

ast.target: Azure OpenAI API 实例名称

ast.name: setName

ast.target: 输入提示词以提高转写准确性

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [WARNING]: LangSmith 收到无法序列化的值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: LangSmith received circular JSON. This will decrease tracer performance.
ast.target: [WARNING]: LangSmith 收到循环 JSON。这会降低跟踪器性能。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: LangSmith failed to fetch info on supported operations. Falling back to batch operations and default limits.
ast.target: [WARNING]: LangSmith 无法获取支持的操作信息。将回退到批量操作和默认限制。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: When tracing in manual flush mode, you must call `await client.flush()` manually to submit trace batches.
ast.target: [WARNING]: 在手动刷新模式下进行跟踪时，必须手动调用 `await client.flush()` 提交跟踪批次。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to calculate number of tokens, falling back to approximate count
ast.target: 无法计算令牌数量，回退为近似计数

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response.functionCall() is deprecated. Use response.functionCalls() instead.
ast.target: response.functionCall() 已弃用。请改用 response.functionCalls()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The "tool_calls" field on a message is only respected if content is a string.
ast.target: 消息中的 "tool_calls" 字段仅在 content 为字符串时才生效。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Adding an edge to a graph that has already been compiled. This will not be reflected in the compiled graph.
ast.target: 正在向已编译的图添加边。这不会反映在已编译的图中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Inconsistent start and end time, startTime > endTime. Setting span duration to 0ms.
ast.target: 开始和结束时间不一致，startTime > endTime。将 span 时长设为 0ms。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: BatchSpanProcessor: maxExportBatchSize must be smaller or equal to maxQueueSize, setting maxExportBatchSize to match maxQueueSize
ast.target: BatchSpanProcessor：maxExportBatchSize 必须小于或等于 maxQueueSize，正在将 maxExportBatchSize 设为与 maxQueueSize 一致

ast.name: text

ast.name: text
ast.source: A restart is required for changes in this section to take effect.
ast.target: 本节更改需要重启才能生效。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
Cannoli Server is a standalone program that you can run alongside Cannoli in Obsidian.

It allows extended Cannoli functionality by offloading long-running tasks, like MCP servers, to a separate process.
ast.target:
Cannoli 服务器是一个独立程序，你可以在 Obsidian 中与 Cannoli 一起运行。

它通过将 MCP 服务器等长时间运行的任务卸载到独立进程，扩展 Cannoli 的功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: See the docs here for more information.
ast.target: 在此处查看文档了解更多信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can run the latest version of Cannoli Server by running the command below:
ast.target: 你可以运行以下命令来启动 Cannoli 服务器的最新版本：

ast.target: 当前 Cannoli 服务器配置。

ast.target: 编辑你的 MCP 服务器配置。每一行代表一个服务器配置。
